name: jobsmith
description: Job-application tools for Claude Code — starting with résumé tailoring grounded in your own verbatim experience bank.

plugins.name: jobsmith
plugins.description: Tailor a résumé to a job by selecting your own accomplishments verbatim from a master bank, then looping it through a peer-review panel until every reviewer clears a confidence bar. Adds the /jobsmith:tailor skill.
